rationale.R1.7: The agent provided detailed and specific feedback on the citations, including correct references for missing works and clarifications on misattributions.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged multiple instances of uncertainty in the citations without presenting them as equally confident claims.
rationale.RX.3: The agent audited every load-bearing citation and flagged several missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.4: The output did not introduce any new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it only provided corrections and clarifications.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with source and reason.
